config.script:
# Open the supply fan controls popup.
	
	system.perspective.openPopup('supply-fan-controls','Building Automation Demo/Page/Controls/Framework/AHU 2/Control Popups/Supply Fan Controls',position = {'left':event.clientX,'top':event.clientY},resizable=False,title='Supply Fan (AHU 2)')

# Open the upper heater controls popup.
	
	system.perspective.openPopup('upper-heater-controls','Building Automation Demo/Page/Controls/Framework/AHU 2/Control Popups/Heating Controls Upper',position = {'left':event.clientX,'top':event.clientY},resizable=False,title='Upper Heater')

# Open the lower heater controls popup.
	
	system.perspective.openPopup('lower-heater-controls','Building Automation Demo/Page/Controls/Framework/AHU 2/Control Popups/Heating Controls Lower',position = {'left':event.clientX,'top':event.clientY},resizable=False,title='Lower Heater')

# Open the gas heating popup.
	
	system.perspective.openPopup('heating-gas','Building Automation Demo/Page/Controls/Framework/AHU 2/Control Popups/Gas Heating Controls',params={'left':event.clientX,'top':event.clientY},resizable=False,title='Gas Heating')

# Open the supply fan controls popup.
		
	system.perspective.openPopup('supply-fan-controls','Building Automation Demo/Page/Controls/Framework/AHU 2/Control Popups/Supply Fan Controls',position = {'left':event.clientX,'top':event.clientY},resizable=False,title='Supply Fan (AHU 2)')

# Open the upper heater controls popup.
		
	system.perspective.openPopup('upper-heater-controls','Building Automation Demo/Page/Controls/Framework/AHU 2/Control Popups/Heating Controls Upper',position = {'left':event.clientX,'top':event.clientY},resizable=False,title='Upper Heater')

# Open the lower heater controls popup.
		
	system.perspective.openPopup('lower-heater-controls','Building Automation Demo/Page/Controls/Framework/AHU 2/Control Popups/Heating Controls Lower',position = {'left':event.clientX,'top':event.clientY},resizable=False,title='Lower Heater')
